assertionResults.fullName: isRecommendationRelevant returns false for expired recommendation
assertionResults.title: returns false for expired recommendation

assertionResults.fullName: isRecommendationRelevant returns false for session recommendation when active session
assertionResults.title: returns false for session recommendation when active session

assertionResults.fullName: isRecommendationRelevant returns false for break when few sessions
assertionResults.title: returns false for break when few sessions

assertionResults.fullName: isRecommendationRelevant returns false for social when no squad
assertionResults.title: returns false for social when no squad

assertionResults.fullName: isRecommendationRelevant returns true for valid recommendation
assertionResults.title: returns true for valid recommendation

assertionResults.fullName: getTopRecommendation returns null for empty array
assertionResults.title: returns null for empty array

assertionResults.fullName: getTopRecommendation returns null when all expired
assertionResults.title: returns null when all expired

assertionResults.fullName: CoachRecommendationSchema rejects confidence out of range
assertionResults.title: rejects confidence out of range

assertionResults.fullName: generateRecommendations generates recommendations based on context
assertionResults.title: generates recommendations based on context

assertionResults.fullName: generateRecommendations includes boss recommendation when boss active
assertionResults.title: includes boss recommendation when boss active

assertionResults.fullName: generateRecommendations includes squad war recommendation when war active
assertionResults.title: includes squad war recommendation when war active
